case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $16,007.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $16,007.00 U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1-100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: KATHY KOLLEHNER, CSR #4102
MINI-MINUTES FOR AUG-29-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE AND DISPOSITION PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $11,000.00 BE RELEASED TO ATTORNEY MARCIA SILVER ON BEHALF OF CLAIMANT PAUL V. KOPEIKIN. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $5,007.00 PLUS INTEREST SINCE DATE OF DEPOSIT IS HEREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PURSUANT TO H&S 11470 ET SEQ AND DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY H&S 11489. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. CLAIMANT WAIVES HIS/HER RIGHT TO HAVE SAME JUDGE OR JURY DECIDE BOTH THE CRIMINAL AND FORFEITURE CASE. CLAIMANT WAIVES CONDITION PRECEDENT TO THIS FORFEITURE. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

MOTION TO STRIKE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION THE CLAIM OF PAUL V. KOPEIKIN FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR AUG-29-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
